    <!DOCTYPE html>
    <html lang="zh-CN">
    <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>中层干部绩效考核平台</title>
    <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 viewBox=%220 0 100 100%22><text y=%22.9em%22 font-size=%2290%22>🏥</text></svg>">
    <!-- Supabase SDK -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2.39.0/dist/umd/supabase.js"></script>
    <!-- XLSX for Excel import/export -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/xlsx@0.18.5/dist/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
    <style>
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    body{font-family:"Microsoft YaHei",sans-serif;background:#f0f4f8;color:#1a2a3a;font-size:13px}
    #loginPage{min-height:100vh;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f2044,#1a4a8c,#0f7ec4);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
    .login-box{background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:40px;width:400px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
    .login-hos{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#888;letter-spacing:2px}
    .login-title{text-align:center;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:#1a4a8c;margin:10px 0}
    .login-sub{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#aaa}
    .role-tabs{display:flex;background:#f0f4f8;border-radius:10px;padding:3px;margin-bottom:20px}
    .role-tab{flex:1;text-align:center;padding:8px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;color:#888}
    .role-tab.active{background:#fff;color:#1a4a8c;font-weight:600}
    .login-field{margin-bottom:14px}
    .login-field label{display:block;font-size:12px;color:#555;margin-bottom:5px}
    .login-field input{width:100%;padding:10px 14px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px}
    .login-btn{width:100%;padding:12px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a4a8c,#0f7ec4);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:10px;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer}
    .login-hint{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#bbb;margin-top:16px}
    #mainPage{display:none}
    .layout{display:flex}
    .sidebar{width:220px;background:#0f2044;min-height:100vh;position:fixed}
    .sidebar-logo{padding:20px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);text-align:center}
    .sidebar-logo h1{font-size:14px;color:#fff}
    .nav-group{margin:8px 0}
    .nav-group-label{padding:6px 16px;font-size:10px;color:#3a5a8a}
    .nav-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 16px;cursor:pointer;color:#7a9ab8;font-size:13px;border-left:3px solid transparent}
    .nav-item:hover,.nav-item.active{background:rgba(59,127,213,.15);color:#fff;border-left-color:#3a7fd5}
    .main{margin-left:220px;width:calc(100% - 220px);min-width:0}
    .topbar{height:56px;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid #e8eef5;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 24px}
    .topbar-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;flex:1}
    .content{flex:1;padding:20px 24px;overflow-y:auto}
    .page{display:none}
    .page.active{display:block}
    .card{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:20px;margin-bottom:16px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.04)}
    .card-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px}
    .stat-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px}
    .stat-card{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.04)}
    .stat-icon{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px}
    .stat-icon.blue{background:#e8f2ff;color:#1a6fd4}
    .stat-icon.green{background:#e8faf0;color:#27ae60}
    .stat-icon.orange{background:#fff5e6;color:#e67e22}
    .stat-icon.red{background:#fdf0f0;color:#e74c3c}
    .stat-num{font-size:26px;font-weight:800}
    .stat-label{font-size:11px;color:#8899aa;margin-top:4px}
    .chart-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px}
    .chart-card{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:18px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.04)}
    .chart-card-title{font-size:12px;color:#8899aa;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:14px}
    .pie-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:30px}
    .pie-svg{width:180px;height:180px;flex-shrink:0;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(138,180,248,.4))}
    .progress-group{margin-bottom:12px}
    .progress-group-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px}
    .progress-group-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;color:#fff}
    .progress-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;margin-right:6px}
    .progress-bar-bg{height:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:4px}
    .progress-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:4px}
    .rank-item{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f5f5f5;font-size:12px}
    .rank-num{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;margin-right:8px}
    .rank-num.top{background:#ffd700;color:#fff}
    .rank-num.normal{background:#f0f4f8;color:#888}
    .group-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:14px}
    .group-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;border-top:4px solid;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
    .group-card:hover{transform:translateY(-3px)}
    .group-card-name{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px}
    .group-card-count{font-size:28px;font-weight:800}
    .group-card-members{max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .3s}
    .group-card.open .group-card-members{max-height:600px}
    .member-item{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:12px}
    .member-name{font-weight:600}
    .member-pos{font-size:10px;color:#8899aa}
    .member-score{font-weight:800;color:#1a6fd4}
    .table-wrap{overflow-x:auto}
    table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse}
    thead th{background:#f8fafc;padding:10px 12px;text-align:left;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#8899aa;text-transform:uppercase}
    tbody td{padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #f0f4f8}
    tbody tr:hover td{background:#f8fafc}
    .tag{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600}
    .tag-blue{background:#e8f2ff;color:#1a6fd4}
    .tag-green{background:#e8faf0;color:#27ae60}
    .tag-orange{background:#fff5e6;color:#e67e22}
    .tag-red{background:#fdf0f0;color:#e74c3c}.tag-purple{background:#f5eeff;color:#8e44ad}
    .btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600}
    .btn-primary{background:#1a4a8c;color:#fff}
    .btn-success{background:#27ae60;color:#fff}
    .btn-danger{background:#e74c3c;color:#fff}
    .btn-default{background:#fff;color:#555;border:1px solid #e0e8f0}
    .btn-sm{padding:4px 10px;font-size:11px}
    .form-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
    .form-item{margin-bottom:12px}
    .form-item label{display:block;font-size:12px;color:#555;margin-bottom:4px}
    .form-item input,.form-item select,.form-item textarea{width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px}
    .search-bar{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .search-bar input,.search-bar select{padding:7px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px}
    .search-bar input{flex:1;min-width:140px}
    .modal{display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background:rgba(10,20,40,.5);z-index:1000;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
    .modal.show{display:flex}
    .modal-box{background:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:24px;width:560px;max-width:95vw;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto}
    .modal-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:20px}
    .modal-header h3{font-size:15px;font-weight:700}
    .modal-close{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;border:none;background:#f0f4f8;cursor:pointer;font-size:16px}
    .modal-footer{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:8px;margin-top:20px}
    .toast{position:fixed;top:20px;right:20px;z-index:9999;background:#fff;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 18px;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.15);transform:translateX(120%);transition:transform .3s;font-size:13px}
    .toast.show{transform:translateX(0)}
    .toast.success{border-left:4px solid #27ae60}
    .toast.error{border-left:4px solid #e74c3c}
    .bigboard{background:#0a1628;min-height:100vh;padding:20px;display:none}
    .bigboard.active{display:block}
    .bigboard-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:20px}
    .bigboard-title{font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:#fff}
    .bigboard-title span{color:#3a7fd5}
    .bigboard-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px}
    .bigboard-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:12px;padding:18px}
    .bigboard-card-title{font-size:11px;color:#4a7aaa;margin-bottom:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px}
    .bigboard-big-num{font-size:36px;font-weight:900;color:#fff}
    .bigboard-big-sub{font-size:11px;color:#4a7aaa;margin-top:6px}
    .bar-item{margin-bottom:10px}
    .bar-info{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:12px}
    .bar-name{color:#b8d4f0}
    .bar-val{color:#5a9cf8;font-weight:700}
    .bar-bg{height:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:3px}
    .bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px}
    .result-tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:16px;background:#f0f4f8;border-radius:10px;padding:3px;width:fit-content}
    .result-tab{padding:7px 16px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;color:#888;font-weight:600}
    .result-tab.active{background:#fff;color:#1a4a8c}
    .person-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px}
    .person-btn{padding:10px 8px;background:#f8fafc;border:2px solid #e8eef5;border-radius:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;transition:all .2s}
    .person-btn:hover{border-color:#1a4a8c;background:#e8f2ff}
    .person-btn.active{border-color:#1a4a8c;background:#1a4a8c;color:#fff}
    .person-name{font-weight:700}
    .person-pos{font-size:10px;opacity:.7;margin-top:2px}
    .review-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}
    .review-person{background:#f8fafc;border-radius:12px;padding:20px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:16px}
    .slider-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
    input[type=range]{flex:1;accent-color:#1a4a8c}
    .slider-val{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#1a4a8c;min-width:40px}
    .assess-summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:14px;margin-bottom:16px}
    .assess-scard{background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:16px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.04)}
    .assess-snum{font-size:30px;font-weight:800}
    .assess-slab{font-size:11px;color:#8899aa;margin-top:4px}
    .page-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px}
    .page-header h2{font-size:17px;font-weight:800}
    .page-desc{font-size:12px;color:#8899aa;margin-top:3px}
    .page-header-right{display:flex;gap:8px}
    .empty-state{padding:40px;text-align:center;color:#8899aa}
    .search-total{font-size:12px;color:#8899aa;padding:10px 0}
    .rank-item{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:8px 12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:6px;gap:10px}
    .rank-num{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:12px}
    .rank-num.top{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f39c12,#e67e22);color:#fff}
    .rank-num.normal{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#8ab4f8}
    .rank-name{flex:1;color:#fff;font-weight:600;font-size:13px}
    .rank-score{color:#5a9cf8;font-weight:700;font-size:13px}
    .progress-group-meta{font-size:11px;color:#8ab4f8}
    .pie-svg{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(138,180,248,0.3));}
    .pie-legend-item{padding:6px 8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-radius:6px;}
    .pie-legend-dot{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:3px;}
    .bigboard-card:hover{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(138,180,248,.3),0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.3);transform:translateY(-2px);transition:all .3s ease;}
    .bigboard-title{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff,#8ab4f8,#fff);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;}
    .chart-card{border:1px solid rgba(138,180,248,.2);box-shadow:inset 0 0 30px rgba(138,180,248,.05);}
    .group-card-members{max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;padding-right:6px}
    .group-card-members::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px}
    .group-card-members::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-radius:3px}
    .group-card-members::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgba(138,180,248,.3);border-radius:3px}
    .group-card-members::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:rgba(138,180,248,.5)}
    .group-card.open .group-card-members{max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto}
    /* Loading overlay */
    #loadingOverlay{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(10,20,40,.85);z-index:99999;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-direction:column}
    .loading-spinner{width:50px;height:50px;border:4px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-top-color:#3a7fd5;border-radius:50%;animation:spin 1s linear infinite}
    .loading-text{color:#fff;margin-top:16px;font-size:14px}
    @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
    </style>
    </head>
    <body>
    <!-- Loading Overlay -->
    <div id="loadingOverlay">
    <div class="loading-spinner"></div>
    <div class="loading-text">正在加载数据...</div>
    </div>
    <div id="loginPage">
    <div class="login-box">
    <div class="login-hos">诸暨市第六人民医院</div>
    <div class="login-title">中层干部绩效考核平台</div>
    <div class="login-sub">ZHUJI NO.6 PEOPLE'S HOSPITAL</div>
    <div class="role-tabs"><div class="role-tab active" onclick="switchLoginTab(this,'cadre')">中层干部</div><div class="role-tab" onclick="switchLoginTab(this,'assessor')">考核人员</div><div class="role-tab" onclick="switchLoginTab(this,'leader')">院领导</div><div class="role-tab" onclick="switchLoginTab(this,'admin')">超级管理员</div></div>
    <div class="login-field"><label>用户名</label><input type="text" id="loginUser" value="admin"></div>
    <div class="login-field"><label>密码</label><input type="password" id="loginPass" value="admin123"></div>
    <button class="login-btn" onclick="doLogin()">登 录 系 统</button>
    <div class="login-hint" id="loginHint">用户名：姓名各字首字母 &nbsp;|&nbsp; 初始密码：2个字姓名为用户名+1234，3个字及以上为用户名+123</div><div style="margin-top:8px;text-align:center"><span style="font-size:11px;color:#1a6fd4;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline" onclick="showLookupModal()">🔍 不知道用户名？点此查询</span></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="lookupModal" style="display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:9999;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><div style="background:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:28px;width:360px"><div style="font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px">🔍 查询我的用户名</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:#888;margin-bottom:10px">输入姓名，自动生成登录账号</div><input type="text" id="lookupName" placeholder="请输入您的姓名" style="width:100%;padding:10px 14px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;box-sizing:border-box;margin-bottom:10px" oninput="doLookup()"><div id="lookupResult" style="min-height:56px;padding:12px;background:#f8fafc;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;color:#aaa">请输入姓名...</div><div style="margin-top:14px;text-align:right"><button onclick="closeLookupModal()" style="padding:8px 20px;background:#1a6fd4;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer">关闭</button></div></div></div><div id="mainPage">
    <div class="layout">
    <div class="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-logo"><h1>绩效考核</h1></div>
    <div class="nav-group">
    <div class="nav-group-label">主菜单</div>
    <div class="nav-item active" onclick="showPage('dashboard',this)"><span>📊</span>数据大屏</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showPage('users',this)"><span>👥</span>人员管理</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showPage('groups',this)"><span>🏢</span>分组管理</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showPage('kpi',this)"><span>📋</span>考核项配置</div>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-group">
    <div class="nav-group-label">考核流程</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showPage('assessment',this)"><span>✏️</span>职能科考核</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showPage('review',this)"><span>⭐</span>领导评议</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showPage('results',this)"><span>🏆</span>成绩汇总</div>
    </div>
    <div class="nav-group">
    <div class="nav-group-label">系统</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="showPage('admins',this)"><span>⚙️</span>权限管理</div>
    <div class="nav-item" data-page="profile" onclick="showPage('profile',this)"><span>👤</span>个人设置</div>
    <div class="nav-item" onclick="doLogout()"><span>🚪</span>退出登录</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="main">
    <div class="topbar">
    <div class="topbar-title" id="pageTitle">工作台</div>
    <div id="topbarUser" style="font-size:12px;color:#888"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="content">
    <div class="page active" id="page-dashboard" style="background:#0a1628;min-height:100vh;padding:20px">
    <div class="bigboard-header" style="margin-bottom:20px">
    <div class="bigboard-title">绩效考核 <span>数据大屏</span></div>
    <div id="dashTime" style="color:#8ab4f8;font-size:13px"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="bigboard-grid" style="margin-bottom:16px">
    <div class="bigboard-card" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)">
    <div class="bigboard-card-title" style="color:#8ab4f8">干部总数</div>
    <div class="bigboard-big-num" id="sTotal" style="color:#fff">0</div>
    <div class="bigboard-big-sub" style="color:#8ab4f8">人</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bigboard-card" onclick="switchDashboardTab('assessed')" style="cursor:pointer;background:rgba(39,174,96,.1);border:1px solid rgba(39,174,96,.3)">
    <div class="bigboard-card-title" style="color:#2ecc71">已完成考核</div>
    <div class="bigboard-big-num" id="sAssessed" style="color:#2ecc71">0</div>
    <div class="bigboard-big-sub" style="color:#2ecc71">人</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bigboard-card" style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)">
    <div class="bigboard-card-title" style="color:#8ab4f8">平均得分</div>
    <div class="bigboard-big-num" id="sAvg" style="color:#fff">--</div>
    <div class="bigboard-big-sub" style="color:#8ab4f8">分</div>
    </div>
    <div class="bigboard-card" onclick="switchDashboardTab('pending')" style="cursor:pointer;background:rgba(243,156,18,.1);border:1px solid rgba(243,156,18,.3)">
    <div class="bigboard-card-title" style="color:#f39c12">待考核人数</div>
    <div class="bigboard-big-num" id="sWarn" style="color:#f39c12">0</div>
    <div class="bigboard-big-sub" style="color:#f39c12">人</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;margin-bottom:16px">
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:12px;padding:16px">
    <div style="color:#8ab4f8;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px">各组人员分布</div>
    <div class="pie-wrap" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:30px;padding:10px"><div style="flex:0 0 auto"><svg class="pie-svg" viewBox="0 0 120 120" id="pieChart" style="width:200px;height:200px"></svg></div><div class="pie-legend" id="pieLegend" style="flex:1;max-width:280px"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:12px;padding:16px">
    <div style="color:#8ab4f8;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px">各组考核进度</div>
    <div id="bbProgress"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:12px;padding:16px">
    <div style="color:#8ab4f8;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px">成绩分布统计</div>
    <div id="bbDist"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 2fr;gap:16px;margin-bottom:16px">
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:12px;padding:16px">
    <div style="color:#8ab4f8;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px">总分排名 TOP5</div>
    <div id="topRankList"></div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:12px;padding:16px">
    <div style="color:#8ab4f8;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px">各组TOP3</div>
    <div id="dashGroupTop3"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:12px;padding:16px">
    <div style="color:#8ab4f8;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px">各组人员详情（点击卡片展开）</div>
    <div id="groupMembersDetail"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="dashboardDetailPanel" style="display:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-top:16px">
    <div style="color:#fff;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px" id="detailPanelTitle">详情</div>
    <div id="detailPanelContent"></div>
    <button class="btn btn-default" onclick="closeDashboardDetail()" style="margin-top:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2)">关闭</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-users">
    <div class="page-header">
    <div><h2>人员管理</h2><p class="page-desc">管理中层干部基本信息</p></div>
    <div class="page-header-right">
    <button class="btn btn-default btn-sm" onclick="downloadExcelTemplate()">下载Excel模板</button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showModal('importModal')">批量导入</button>
    <button class="btn btn-success btn-sm" onclick="showModal('userModal')">新增人员</button>
    <button class="btn btn-default btn-sm" id="sortModeBtn" onclick="toggleSortMode()">切换排序模式（按分数）</button>
    <button class="btn btn-success btn-sm" id="saveSortBtn" onclick="saveCustomSort()" style="display:none">保存排序</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="search-bar">
    <input type="text" id="userSearch" placeholder="搜索姓名/职务..." onkeyup="renderUsers()">
    <select id="groupFilter" onchange="renderUsers()"><option value="">全部分组</option><option>行政组</option><option>临床组</option><option>护理组</option><option>医技组</option><option>社区组</option></select>
    <select id="staffingFilter" onchange="renderUsers()"><option value="">全部编制</option><option>在编</option><option>非编</option></select>
    </div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
    <table>
    <thead><tr><th class="sort-col">排序</th><th>姓名</th><th>性别</th><th>出生年月</th><th>职务</th><th>分组</th><th>编制</th><th>总分</th><th>操作</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="userTableBody"></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    <div class="search-total">共 <strong id="userCount">0</strong> 人</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-groups">
    <div class="page-header"><div><h2>分组管理</h2><p class="page-desc">点击卡片展开查看组内成员详情</p></div></div>
    <div class="group-grid" id="groupsGrid"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-kpi">
    <div class="page-header"><div><h2>考核项配置</h2><p class="page-desc">职能科考核项目，支持加分/扣分，可设置固定分值或打分范围</p></div><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showAddKpiModal()">+ 新增考核项</button></div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="table-wrap">
    <table>
    <thead><tr><th>考核项目</th><th>分值/范围</th><th>类型</th><th>打分方式</th><th>状态</th><th>操作</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="kpiTableBody"></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal" id="kpiModal">
    <div class="modal-box" style="max-width:460px">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3 id="kpiModalTitle">新增考核项</h3><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('kpiModal')">x</button></div>
    <div class="form-item"><label>考核项目名称 <span style="color:#e74c3c">*</span></label>
    <input type="text" id="kpiName" placeholder="输入考核项目名称" style="width:100%;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box"></div>
    <div class="form-item"><label>类型 <span style="color:#e74c3c">*</span></label>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:6px">
    <div id="kpiTypeDeduct" onclick="switchKpiType('deduct')" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid #e74c3c;background:#fdf0f0;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#e74c3c;user-select:none">− 扣分项</div>
    <div id="kpiTypeAdd" onclick="switchKpiType('add')" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid #e0e8f0;background:#f8fafc;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#888;user-select:none">+ 加分项</div>
    <div id="kpiTypeBoth" onclick="switchKpiType('both')" style="flex:1;padding:10px;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid #e0e8f0;background:#f8fafc;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#888;user-select:none">± 正负分</div>
    </div>
    <input type="hidden" id="kpiTypeHidden" value="deduct">
    </div>
    <div class="form-item"><label>打分方式</label>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:6px">
    <div id="kpiModeFixed" onclick="switchKpiMode('fixed')" style="flex:1;padding:9px;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid #1a6fd4;background:#e8f2ff;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#1a6fd4;user-select:none">固定分值</div>
    <div id="kpiModeRange" onclick="switchKpiMode('range')" style="flex:1;padding:9px;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid #e0e8f0;background:#f8fafc;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#888;user-select:none">打分范围</div>
    </div>
    <input type="hidden" id="kpiModeHidden" value="fixed">
    </div>
    <div id="kpiFixedArea" class="form-item"><label>分值（正数，系统自动按类型处理正负）<span style="color:#e74c3c">*</span></label>
    <input type="number" id="kpiScore" placeholder="例：0.5" min="0" step="0.1" style="width:100%;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box"></div>
    <div id="kpiRangeArea" class="form-item" style="display:none"><label>打分范围</label>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center">
    <input type="number" id="kpiMin" placeholder="最小分" step="0.1" style="flex:1;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px">
    <span style="color:#888">~</span>
    <input type="number" id="kpiMax" placeholder="最大分" step="0.1" style="flex:1;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px">
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:#aaa;margin-top:4px">考核时在此范围内手动输入分值</div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
    <button class="btn btn-default" onclick="closeModal('kpiModal')">取消</button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveKpiItem()">保存</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-assessment">
    <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">职能科考核（底分70分）</div>
    <div style="background:#f8fafc;padding:14px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px;color:#555">
    <strong>说明：</strong>选择年度和季度，考核记录按期间存储。职能科考核成绩 = 70分 - 扣分总额。不同期间的记录独立保存，可随时切换查看。
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:4px">
    <div style="flex:1">
    <label style="font-size:12px;color:#555;font-weight:600">年度</label>
    <select id="assessYearSelect" onchange="onPeriodChange('assess')" style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;margin-top:4px">
    <option value="2025">2025年</option><option value="2026" selected>2026年</option><option value="2027">2027年</option><option value="2028">2028年</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div style="flex:1">
    <label style="font-size:12px;color:#555;font-weight:600">季度</label>
    <select id="assessQuarterSelect" onchange="onPeriodChange('assess')" style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;margin-top:4px">
    <option value="Q1">第一季度(1-3月)</option><option value="Q2">第二季度(4-6月)</option><option value="Q3">第三季度(7-9月)</option><option value="Q4" selected>第四季度(10-12月)</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="assessPeriodInfo" style="font-size:11px;color:#1a6fd4;margin-bottom:8px"></div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px"><button class="btn" style="background:#1a6fd4;color:#fff;padding:8px 20px;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600" onclick="updateAssessPersonList()">查看成绩</button></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">第一步：选择被考核人</div>
    <div class="form-item">
    <label>按分组选择被考核人</label>
    <select id="assessGroupSelect" onchange="updateAssessPersonList()" style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px">
    <option value="">-- 请选择分组 --</option>
    <option value="行政组">行政组</option>
    <option value="临床组">临床组</option>
    <option value="护理组">护理组</option>
    <option value="医技组">医技组</option>
    <option value="社区组">社区组</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div id="assessPersonList" style="display:none;margin-top:12px">
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:#555;margin-bottom:8px"><strong>该分组人员：</strong></div>
    <div id="personGrid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="selectedPersonInfo" style="display:none;background:#e8f2ff;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-top:12px">
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:#1a6fd4"><strong>已选择：</strong><span id="selectedPersonName"></span> (<span id="selectedPersonPos"></span>)</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" id="assessForm" style="display:none">
    <div class="card-title">第二步：输入考核信息</div>
    <div style="background:#fff5e6;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#e67e22">
    <strong>当前考核人：</strong><span id="assessPersonTitle">--</span>
    </div>
    <div class="form-row">
    <div class="form-item">
    <label>考核项目 *</label>
    <select id="assessItem" style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px">
    <option value="">-- 请选择考核项目 --</option>
    </select>
    <div style="font-size:10px;color:#aaa;margin-top:4px">说明：扣分项目为负数，加分项目为正数</div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-item">
    <label>分数 *</label>
    <input type="number" id="assessScore" step="0.1" min="-10" max="10" placeholder="输入分数" style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px">
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-item">
    <label>原因说明</label>
    <textarea id="assessReason" placeholder="请输入扣分原因..." style="width:100%;min-height:80px;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px"></textarea>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px">
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="submitAssess()">提交考核</button>
    <button class="btn btn-default" onclick="cancelAssess()">取消</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">考核记录</div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
    <table>
    <thead><tr><th>被考核人</th><th>分组</th><th>考核项目</th><th>扣分</th><th>原因</th><th>日期</th><th>操作</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="assessTableBody"></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    <div id="assessEmpty" style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:#8899aa;font-size:12px">暂无考核记录</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-review">
    <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">领导评议（满分30分）</div>
    <div style="background:#f8fafc;padding:14px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px;color:#555">
    <strong>说明：</strong>选择年度和季度，评议记录按期间存储。领导评议成绩 = 滑块选择的分值（0-30分）。每个季度可提交一次评议。
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:4px">
    <div style="flex:1">
    <label style="font-size:12px;color:#555;font-weight:600">年度</label>
    <select id="reviewYearSelect" onchange="onPeriodChange('review')" style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;margin-top:4px">
    <option value="2025">2025年</option><option value="2026" selected>2026年</option><option value="2027">2027年</option><option value="2028">2028年</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div style="flex:1">
    <label style="font-size:12px;color:#555;font-weight:600">季度</label>
    <select id="reviewQuarterSelect" onchange="onPeriodChange('review')" style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;margin-top:4px">
    <option value="Q1">第一季度(1-3月)</option><option value="Q2">第二季度(4-6月)</option><option value="Q3">第三季度(7-9月)</option><option value="Q4" selected>第四季度(10-12月)</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div id="reviewPeriodInfo" style="font-size:11px;color:#1a6fd4;margin-bottom:8px"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">第一步：选择被评议人</div>
    <div class="form-item">
    <label>按分组选择被评议人</label>
    <select id="reviewGroupSelect" onchange="updateReviewPersonList()" style="width:100%;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px">
    <option value="">-- 请选择分组 --</option>
    <option value="行政组">行政组</option>
    <option value="临床组">临床组</option>
    <option value="护理组">护理组</option>
    <option value="医技组">医技组</option>
    <option value="社区组">社区组</option>
    </select>
    </div>
    <div id="reviewPersonList" style="display:none;margin-top:12px">
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:#555;margin-bottom:8px"><strong>该分组人员：</strong></div>
    <div id="reviewPersonGrid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="selectedReviewPersonInfo" style="display:none;background:#e8f2ff;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-top:12px">
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:#1a6fd4"><strong>已选择：</strong><span id="selectedReviewPersonName"></span> (<span id="selectedReviewPersonPos"></span>)</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" id="reviewForm" style="display:none">
    <div class="card-title">第二步：输入评议信息</div>
    <div style="background:#fff5e6;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:#e67e22">
    <strong>当前评议人：</strong><span id="reviewPersonTitle">--</span>
    </div>
    <div class="form-item">
    <label>评议得分（0-30分）</label>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:8px">
    <input type="range" id="reviewScore" min="0" max="30" value="30" oninput="document.getElementById('reviewScoreVal').textContent=this.value" style="flex:1;accent-color:#1a4a8c">
    <span id="reviewScoreVal" style="font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#1a4a8c;min-width:40px;text-align:center">30</span>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;color:#aaa;margin-top:4px">向左滑动扣分，向右保留高分</div>
    </div>
    <div class="form-item">
    <label>评议意见</label>
    <textarea id="reviewOpinion" placeholder="请输入评议意见..." style="width:100%;min-height:80px;padding:8px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px"></textarea>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:14px">
    <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="submitReview()">提交评议</button>
    <button class="btn btn-default" onclick="cancelReview()">取消</button>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="card-title">评议记录</div>
    <div class="table-wrap">
    <table>
    <thead><tr><th>被评议人</th><th>分组</th><th>评议得分</th><th>评议意见</th><th>日期</th><th>操作</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="reviewTableBody"></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    <div id="reviewEmpty" style="padding:20px;text-align:center;color:#8899aa;font-size:12px">暂无评议记录</div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-results">
    <div class="card" style="padding:16px">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center">
    <label style="font-size:12px;color:#555;font-weight:600">查看</label>
    <select id="resultPeriodType" onchange="onResultPeriodTypeChange()" style="padding:6px 10px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px">
    <option value="year">年度汇总</option><option value="Q1">第一季度</option><option value="Q2">第二季度</option><option value="Q3">第三季度</option><option value="Q4" selected>第四季度</option>
    </select>
    <select id="resultYearSelect" onchange="renderResultsAll()" style="padding:6px 10px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px">
    <option value="2025">2025年</option><option value="2026" selected>2026年</option><option value="2027">2027年</option><option value="2028">2028年</option>
    </select>
    <button class="btn" style="background:#1a6fd4;color:#fff;padding:6px 16px;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600" onclick="renderResultsAll()">查看成绩</button>
    </div>
    <div id="resultPeriodLabel" style="font-size:12px;color:#1a6fd4;font-weight:600"></div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="result-tabs">
    <div class="result-tab active" data-group="all" onclick="switchResultTab('all',this)">全部</div>
    <div class="result-tab" data-group="行政组" onclick="switchResultTab('行政组',this)">行政组</div>
    <div class="result-tab" data-group="临床组" onclick="switchResultTab('临床组',this)">临床组</div>
    <div class="result-tab" data-group="护理组" onclick="switchResultTab('护理组',this)">护理组</div>
    <div class="result-tab" data-group="医技组" onclick="switchResultTab('医技组',this)">医技组</div>
    <div class="result-tab" data-group="社区组" onclick="switchResultTab('社区组',this)">社区组</div>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-row">
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon blue">人</div><div><div class="stat-num" id="resTotal">0</div><div class="stat-label">参评人数</div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon green">均</div><div><div class="stat-num" id="resAvg">--</div><div class="stat-label">平均分</div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon orange">高</div><div><div class="stat-num" id="resMax">--</div><div class="stat-label">最高分</div></div></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-icon red">低</div><div><div class="stat-num" id="resMin">--</div><div class="stat-label">最低分</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="card">
    <div class="table-wrap">
    <table>
    <thead><tr><th>排名</th><th>姓名</th><th>分组</th><th>职务</th><th>职能科(70)</th><th>领导评议(30)</th><th>总分(100)</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="resultsTableBody"></tbody>
    </table>
    </div>
    </div>
    </div>
    <div class="page" id="page-admins">
    <div class="card"><div class="card-title">超级管理员</div><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px;background:#f8fafc;border-radius:8px"><div style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a4a8c,#0f7ec4);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:16px;font-weight:700" id="superAvatar">管</div><div style="flex:1"><div style="font-weight:700" id="superName">admin</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:#8899aa">拥有全部权限</div></div><button class="btn btn-default btn-sm" onclick="showModal('editSuperModal')">修改密码</button></div></div>
    <div class="card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:14px"><div class="card-title">普通管理员</div><button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showModal('adminModal')">新增管理员</button></div><div id="adminList"><div class="empty-state">暂无普通管理员</div></div></div>
    <div class="card"><div class="card-title">数据管理</div><div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap"><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="exportAllData()">导出全部数据(Excel)</button><button class="btn btn-default" onclick="exportUsersExcel()">导出人员列表</button><button class="btn btn-default" onclick="exportResultsExcel()">导出考核结果</button><button class="btn btn-default" onclick="clearAllData()">清空所有数据</button></div></div>
    </div>
    </div></div></div>
    <div class="page" id="page-profile" style="padding-left:220px;padding-top:20px;box-sizing:border-box"><div class="card"><div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px"><div class="card-title" style="margin-bottom:0">个人信息</div><button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onclick="showEditProfileModal()">编辑信息</button></div><div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;padding:16px;background:#f8fafc;border-radius:12px"><div style="flex-shrink:0;text-align:center"><div id="profileAvatar" style="width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a4a8c,#0f7ec4);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;overflow:hidden;margin:0 auto 6px"></div><label style="font-size:10px;color:#1a6fd4;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline">更换头像<input type="file" id="avatarInput" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="uploadAvatar(event)"></label></div><div style="flex:1;min-width:0"><div id="profileDisplayName" style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#1a2a3a;margin-bottom:6px">--</div><div id="profileDisplayRole" style="font-size:12px;color:#1a6fd4;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px">--</div><div id="profileDisplayExtra" style="font-size:12px;color:#8899aa;line-height:2">--</div></div></div></div><div class="card"><div class="card-title">修改密码</div><div style="max-width:360px"><div class="form-item"><label>当前密码 *</label><input type="password" id="profileOldPass" placeholder="输入当前密码" style="width:100%;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px"></div><div class="form-item"><label>新密码（至少6位）*</label><input type="password" id="profileNewPass" placeholder="输入新密码" style="width:100%;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px"></div><div class="form-item"><label>确认新密码 *</label><input type="password" id="profileNewPass2" placeholder="再次输入新密码" style="width:100%;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px"></div><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="changePasswordFromProfile()">保存密码</button></div></div></div><div class="modal" id="editProfileModal"><div class="modal-box" style="max-width:420px"><div class="modal-header"><h3>编辑个人信息</h3><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('editProfileModal')">x</button></div><div id="editProfileFields"></div><div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-default" onclick="closeModal('editProfileModal')">取消</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveProfileInfo()">保存</button></div></div></div><div class="modal" id="importModal"><div class="modal-box"><div class="modal-header"><h3>批量导入人员</h3><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('importModal')">x</button></div><div style="background:#f8fafc;padding:14px;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:11px;color:#555"><strong>方式一：直接上传Excel文件</strong><br>点击下方"选择文件"按钮，选择Excel文件自动解析</div><div style="margin-bottom:14px"><input type="file" id="excelFile" accept=".xls,.xlsx" onchange="handleExcelUpload(event)" style="padding:8px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;width:100%"><div style="font-size:10px;color:#aaa;margin-top:4px">支持 .xls 和 .xlsx 格式</div></div><div style="border-top:1px solid #e0e8f0;padding-top:14px;margin-bottom:14px"><strong style="font-size:11px;color:#555">方式二：复制粘贴Excel数据</strong><br><div style="font-size:11px;color:#555;margin-top:6px">1️⃣ 点击"下载Excel模板"获取标准模板<br>2️⃣ 在Excel中填入人员信息（每行一条）<br>3️⃣ 复制Excel中的数据（包括表头）<br>4️⃣ 粘贴到下方文本框<br>5️⃣ 点击"解析数据"验证<br>6️⃣ 点击"确认导入"完成</div></div><div style="margin-bottom:12px"><button class="btn btn-default btn-sm" onclick="downloadExcelTemplate()">⬇ 下载Excel模板</button></div><div style="margin-bottom:8px;font-size:12px;color:#555"><strong>粘贴Excel数据：</strong></div><textarea id="importText" placeholder="从Excel复制数据并粘贴到这里（包括表头行）..." style="width:100%;min-height:100px;padding:10px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;font-family:monospace"></textarea><div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-default" onclick="closeModal('importModal')">取消</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="parseImportData()">解析数据</button><button class="btn btn-success" onclick="confirmImport()">确认导入</button></div></div></div>
    <div class="modal" id="userModal"><div class="modal-box"><div class="modal-header"><h3 id="userModalTitle">新增人员</h3><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('userModal')">x</button></div><input type="hidden" id="editUserId"><div class="form-row"><div class="form-item"><label>姓名 *</label><input type="text" id="newName" placeholder="输入姓名"></div><div class="form-item"><label>性别</label><select id="newGender"><option>男</option><option>女</option></select></div></div><div class="form-row"><div class="form-item"><label>出生年月</label><input type="text" id="newBirth" placeholder="1980-05"></div><div class="form-item"><label>工作时间</label><input type="text" id="newWorkDate" placeholder="2005-07"></div></div><div class="form-row"><div class="form-item"><label>政治面貌</label><select id="newPolitical"><option>中共党员</option><option>群众</option></select></div><div class="form-item"><label>编制</label><select id="newStaffing"><option>在编</option><option>非编</option></select></div></div><div class="form-row"><div class="form-item"><label>职务 *</label><input type="text" id="newPosition" placeholder="输入职务"></div><div class="form-item"><label>任职时间</label><input type="text" id="newDutyDate" placeholder="2020-03"></div></div><div class="form-item"><label>分组 *</label><select id="newGroup"><option>行政组</option><option>临床组</option><option>护理组</option><option>医技组</option><option>社区组</option></select></div><div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-default" onclick="closeModal('userModal')">取消</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveUser()">保存</button></div></div></div>
    <div class="modal" id="adminModal"><div class="modal-box" style="max-width:500px"><div class="modal-header"><h3>新增管理员</h3><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('adminModal')">x</button></div><div class="form-item"><label>用户名 <span style="color:#e74c3c">*</span></label><input type="text" id="adminUser" placeholder="输入用户名" style="width:100%;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box"></div><div class="form-item"><label>密码 <span style="color:#e74c3c">*</span></label><input type="password" id="adminPass" placeholder="输入密码" style="width:100%;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box"></div><div class="form-item"><label>确认密码 <span style="color:#e74c3c">*</span></label><input type="password" id="adminPass2" placeholder="再次输入" style="width:100%;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid #e0e8f0;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;box-sizing:border-box"></div><div class="form-item"><label>角色通道 <span style="color:#e74c3c">*</span></label><div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:8px"><div id="assessorTabBtn" onclick="switchAdminRoleTab('assessor')" style="flex:1;padding:11px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid #1a6fd4;background:#e8f2ff;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1a6fd4;user-select:none">✎ 考核人员</div><div id="leaderTabBtn" onclick="switchAdminRoleTab('leader')" style="flex:1;padding:11px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:2px solid #e0e8f0;background:#f8fafc;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#888;user-select:none">⚖ 院领导</div><input type="hidden" id="adminRoleHidden" value="assessor"></div><div style="margin-top:14px"><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#555;margin-bottom:8px">权限范围 <span style="font-weight:400;color:#aaa">(可多选)</span></div><div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;background:#f8fafc;border-radius:10px;padding:14px"><label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8eef5"><input type="checkbox" id="perm_dashboard" checked style="accent-color:#1a6fd4;width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0"><span>▶</span>工作台查看</label><label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8eef5"><input type="checkbox" id="perm_bigboard" checked style="accent-color:#1a6fd4;width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0"><span style="color:#27ae60">▶</span>数据大屏</label><label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8eef5"><input type="checkbox" id="perm_assess" checked style="accent-color:#1a6fd4;width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0"><span style="color:#e67e22">▶</span>职能科考核</label><label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8eef5"><input type="checkbox" id="perm_review" checked style="accent-color:#1a6fd4;width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0"><span style="color:#9b59b6">▶</span>领导评议</label><label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8eef5;grid-column:span 2"><input type="checkbox" id="perm_users" style="accent-color:#1a6fd4;width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0"><span style="color:#e74c3c">▶</span>人员管理（增/删/改）</label><label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8eef5"><input type="checkbox" id="perm_groups" style="accent-color:#1a6fd4;width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0"><span>▶</span>分组管理</label><label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8eef5"><input type="checkbox" id="perm_kpi" style="accent-color:#1a6fd4;width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0"><span>▶</span>考核项配置</label><label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8eef5;grid-column:span 2"><input type="checkbox" id="perm_results" checked style="accent-color:#1a6fd4;width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0"><span style="color:#2ecc71">▶</span>成绩汇总查看</label><label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e8eef5;grid-column:span 2"><input type="checkbox" id="perm_admins" style="accent-color:#1a6fd4;width:15px;height:15px;flex-shrink:0"><span style="color:#8e44ad">▶</span>权限管理（增/删管理员）</label><div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-default" onclick="closeModal('adminModal')">取消</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="addAdmin()">保存</button></div></div></div></div>
    <div class="modal" id="editSuperModal"><div class="modal-box"><div class="modal-header"><h3>修改超级管理员密码</h3><button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('editSuperModal')">x</button></div><div class="form-item"><label>用户名</label><input type="text" id="superAdminUser" value="admin"></div><div class="form-item"><label>新密码（留空不修改）</label><input type="password" id="superAdminNewPass" placeholder="输入新密码"></div><div class="form-item"><label>确认新密码</label><input type="password" id="superAdminNewPass2" placeholder="再次输入"></div><div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-default" onclick="closeModal('editSuperModal')">取消</button><button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="saveSuperAdmin()">保存</button></div></div></div>
    <div class="toast" id="toast"><span id="toastMsg"></span></div>
    <script>
    // =====================================================
    // Supabase 配置 - 从环境变量读取
    // =====================================================
    const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://jikwwprfsrkpeukxdsnk.supabase.co';
    const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imppa3d3cHJmc3JrcGV1a3hkc25rIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzYxMTczMTgsImV4cCI6MjA5MTY5MzMxOH0.sMfOG8WbGpd3myK1lSvbu-T-AOjMo5x_TbOqgVRef_s';
    // 初始化 Supabase 客户端
    let supabase = null;
    if (SUPABASE_URL !== 'YOUR_SUPABASE_URL' && SUPABASE_ANON_KEY !== 'YOUR_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY') {
    supabase = window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY);
    }
    // =====================================================
    // 全局变量
    // =====================================================
    var users = [], admins = [], parsedData = [], assessRecords = [], reviewRecords = [];
    var groups = [
    {name: "行政组", color: "#1a6fd4"},
    {name: "临床组", color: "#27ae60"},
    {name: "护理组", color: "#e67e22"},
    {name: "医技组", color: "#8e44ad"},
    {name: "社区组", color: "#16a085"}
    ];
    var kpiItems = [];
    var currentUser = "", currentRole = "", currentUserPerms = null, currentCadre = null, currentLoginTab = "cadre";
    var superadmin = {user: "admin", pass: "admin123"};
    var showFullDashboard = false; // 是否显示完整数据大屏
    var customSortMode = false; // 是否启用自定义排序模式
    // 姓名字典
    var nameDict = {};
    // =====================================================
    // 初始化
    // =====================================================
    async function init() {
    // 加载字典
    loadNameDict();
    // 尝试加载远程数据
    if (supabase) {
    await loadDataFromSupabase();
    }
    // 隐藏加载界面
    document.getElementById('loadingOverlay').style.display = 'none';
    }
    // 加载姓名字典
    function loadNameDict() {
    nameDict = {"赵":"zhao","钱":"qian","孙":"sun","李":"li","周":"zhou","吴":"wu","郑":"zheng","王":"wang","冯":"feng","陈":"chen","褚":"chu","卫":"wei","蒋":"jiang","沈":"shen","韩":"han","杨":"yang","朱":"zhu","秦":"qin","尤":"you","许":"xu","何":"he","吕":"lv","施":"shi","张":"zhang","孔":"kong","曹":"cao","严":"yan","华":"hua","金":"jin","魏":"wei","陶":"tao","姜":"jiang","戚":"qi","谢":"xie","邹":"zou","喻":"yu","柏":"bai","水":"shui","窦":"dou","章":"zhang","云":"yun","苏":"su","潘":"pan","葛":"ge","范":"fan","彭":"peng","郎":"lang","鲁":"lu","韦":"wei","昌":"chang","马":"ma","苗":"miao","凤":"feng","花":"hua","方":"fang","俞":"yu","任":"ren","袁":"yuan","柳":"liu","鲍":"bao","史":"shi","唐":"tang","费":"fei","廉":"lian","薛":"xue","雷":"lei","贺":"he","倪":"ni","汤":"tang","滕":"teng","殷":"yin","罗":"luo","毕":"bi","郝":"hao","邬":"wu","安":"an","常":"chang","乐":"le","于":"yu","傅":"fu","皮":"pi","齐":"qi","康":"kang","伍":"wu","余":"yu","元":"yuan","顾":"gu","孟":"meng","平":"ping","黄":"huang","和":"he","穆":"mu","萧":"xiao","尹":"yin","姚":"yao","邵":"shao","汪":"wang","祁":"qi","毛":"mao","禹":"yu","狄":"di","米":"mi","贝":"bei","明":"ming","臧":"zang","成":"cheng","戴":"dai","宋":"song","茅":"mao","庞":"pang","熊":"xiong","纪":"ji","舒":"shu","屈":"qu","项":"xiang","祝":"zhu","董":"dong","梁":"liang","杜":"du","阮":"ruan","蓝":"lan","闵":"min","席":"xi","季":"ji","麻":"ma","强":"qiang","贾":"jia","路":"lu","娄":"lou","危":"wei","江":"jiang","童":"tong","颜":"yan","郭":"guo","梅":"mei","盛":"sheng","林":"lin","刁":"diao","钟":"zhong","徐":"xu","邱":"qiu","骆":"luo","高":"gao","夏":"xia","蔡":"cai","田":"tian","樊":"fan","胡":"hu","凌":"ling","霍":"huo","虞":"yu","万":"wan","支":"zhi","柯":"ke","管":"guan","卢":"lu","莫":"mo","经":"jing","房":"fang","丁":"ding","宣":"xuan","邓":"deng","单":"dan","杭":"hang","洪":"hong","包":"bao","诸":"zhu","左":"zuo","石":"shi","崔":"cui","吉":"ji","龚":"gong","程":"cheng","裴":"pei","陆":"lu","荣":"rong","翁":"weng","刘":"liu","景":"jing","龙":"long","叶":"ye","黎":"li","白":"bai","宁":"ning","甘":"gan","祖":"zu","武":"wu","符":"fu","伟":"wei","芳":"fang","娜":"na","秀":"xiu","英":"ying","慧":"hui","美":"mei","娟":"juan","珍":"zhen","珠":"zhu","萍":"ping","玲":"ling","玉":"yu","静":"jing","敏":"min","丽":"li","媛":"yuan","艳":"yan","素":"su","莲":"lian","真":"zhen","雪":"xue","爱":"ai","霞":"xia","香":"xiang","月":"yue","莺":"ying","瑞":"rui","凡":"fan","佳":"jia","嘉":"jia","琼":"qiong","勤":"qin","珊":"shan","莉":"li","兰":"lan","洁":"jie","梦":"meng","琴":"qin","楠":"nan","红":"hong","峰":"feng","涛":"tao","浩":"hao","海":"hai","博":"bo","晨":"chen","亮":"liang","宏":"hong","凯":"kai","康":"kang","建":"jian","杰":"jie","君":"jun","文":"wen","华":"hua","超":"chao","波":"bo","燕":"yan","凤":"feng","婷":"ting","琳":"lin","倩":"qian","颖":"ying","璐":"lu","瑶":"yao","怡":"yi","妍":"yan","岚":"lan","蓉":"rong","雯":"wen","晶":"jing","芬":"fen","聪":"cong","宇":"yu","学":"xue","思":"si","志":"zhi","勇":"yong","诚":"cheng","德":"de","刚":"gang","乐":"le","晖":"hui","旭":"xu","豪":"hao","锐":"rui","泽":"ze","龙":"long","虎":"hu","琪":"qi","瑾":"jin","莹":"ying","璇":"xuan","萱":"xuan","晟":"sheng","晔":"ye","嵋":"mei","瑄":"xuan","骞":"qian","泓":"hong","滢":"ying","蕊":"rui","嫣":"yan","晴":"qing","娅":"ya","娴":"xian","嘉":"jia","佳":"jia","俊":"jun","峻":"jun","均":"jun","骏":"jun","磊":"lei","蕾":"lei","冷":"leng","力":"li","立":"li","利":"li","灵":"ling","露":"lu","鹿":"lu","伦":"lun","轮":"lun","洛":"luo","旅":"lv","绿":"lv","律":"lv","岭":"ling","领":"ling","流":"liu","六":"liu","楼":"lou","峦":"luan","骆":"luo","落":"luo","茂":"mao","玫":"mei","铭":"ming","默":"mo","墨":"mo","沐":"mu","睦":"mu","南":"nan","宁":"ning","诺":"nuo","纳":"na","乃":"nai","倪":"ni","霓":"ni","年":"nian","念":"nian","牛":"niu","浓":"nong","培":"pei","鹏":"peng","朴":"pu","普":"pu","浦":"pu","璞":"pu","琦":"qi","琪":"qi","青":"qing","庆":"qing","群":"qun","泉":"quan","然":"ran","儒":"ru","润":"run","若":"ruo","睿":"rui","日":"ri","柔":"rou","三":"san","善":"shan","绍":"shao","深":"shen","胜":"sheng","圣":"sheng","实":"shi","世":"shi","树":"shu","顺":"shun","硕":"shuo","岁":"sui","穗":"sui","随":"sui","台":"tai","泰":"tai","桃":"tao","腾":"teng","甜":"tian","彤":"tong","韬":"tao","特":"te","田":"tian","通":"tong","同":"tong","图":"tu","土":"tu","团":"tuan","万":"wan","旺":"wang","威":"wei","微":"wei","维":"wei","闻":"wen","稳":"wen","沃":"wo","卧":"wo","握":"wo","无":"wu","雾":"wu","悟":"wu","物":"wu","务":"wu","舞":"wu","希":"xi","溪":"xi","贤":"xian","现":"xian","祥":"xiang","晓":"xiao","心":"xin","星":"xing","兴":"xing","寻":"xun","迅":"xun","阳":"yang","耀":"yao","一":"yi","宜":"yi","义":"yi","艺":"yi","毅":"yi","意":"yi","逸":"yi","永":"yong","优":"you","悠":"you","友":"you","有":"you","育":"yu","豫":"yu","源":"yuan","远":"yuan","悦":"yue","运":"yun","韵":"yun","允":"yun","跃":"yue","岳":"yue","泽":"ze","增":"zeng","展":"zhan","章":"zhang","振":"zhen","正":"zheng","之":"zhi","志":"zhi","智":"zhi","中":"zhong","忠":"zhong","仲":"zhong","洲":"zhou","竹":"zhu","卓":"zhuo","子":"zi","宗":"zong","总":"zong","祖":"zu","尊":"zun","昭":"zhao","哲":"zhe","征":"zheng","政":"zheng","知":"zhi","职":"zhi","植":"zhi","止":"zhi","致":"zhi","制":"zhi","质":"zhi","治":"zhi","种":"zhong","众":"zhong","舟":"zhou","珠":"zhu","诸":"zhu","烛":"zhu","庄":"zhuang","装":"zhuang","追":"zhui","字":"zi","综":"zong","棕":"zong","走":"zou","足":"zu","组":"zu","作":"zuo","坐":"zuo","做":"zuo","霜":"shuang","曦":"xi","澜":"lan","川":"chuan","森":"sen","栋":"dong","柱":"zhu","桥":"qiao","道":"dao","大":"da","小":"xiao","长":"chang","宽":"kuan","厚":"hou","重":"zhong","快":"kuai","慢":"man","早":"zao","晚":"wan","好":"hao","善":"shan","信":"xin","礼":"li","仁":"ren","和":"he","健":"jian","福":"fu","寿":"shou","喜":"xi","歌":"ge","诗":"shi","书":"shu","才":"cai","气":"qi","节":"jie","品":"pin","格":"ge","雅":"ya","清":"qing","纯":"chun","圆":"yuan","方":"fang","钢":"gang","铁":"tie","银":"yin","铜":"tong"};
    }
    // 获取姓名首字母
    function getNameInitials(name) {
    if (!name) return "";
    var r = "";
    for (var i = 0; i < name.length; i++) {
    var c = name[i];
    var py = nameDict[c];
    r += py ? py[0].toLowerCase() : c.toLowerCase();
    }
    return r;
    }
    // =====================================================
    // Supabase 数据操作
    // =====================================================
    // 从 Supabase 加载所有数据
    async function loadDataFromSupabase() {
    try {
    console.log("开始从 Supabase 加载数据...");
    showLoadingOverlay("正在加载数据...");
    // 加载超级管理员（必须）
    var superResult = await supabase.from('superadmin').select('*').limit(1);
    if (superResult.data && superResult.data.length > 0) {
    superadmin = superResult.data[0];
    console.log("✓ 超级管理员加载成功");
    } else {
    console.log("✗ 超级管理员未找到");
    }
    // 加载人员（必须，用于登录验证）
    var usersResult = await supabase.from('users').select('id,name,group,position,sort_order');
    console.log("从 Supabase 获取到人员数据：", usersResult.data ? usersResult.data.length + " 条" : "无数据");
    if (usersResult.error) {
    console.error("✗ 加载人员失败：", usersResult.error);
    }
    if (usersResult.data && usersResult.data.length > 0) {
    users = usersResult.data.map(function(u) {
    return {
    id: u.id,
    name: u.name,
    gender: '男',
    birth: '',
    workDate: '',
    political: '群众',
    position: u.position,
    dutyDate: '',
    group: u.group,
    staffing: '在编',
    avatar: null,
    sortOrder: u.sort_order || 0
    };
    });
    console.log("✓ 从数据库加载了 " + users.length + " 名人员");
    } else {
    console.log("✗ 数据库中没有人员数据");
    }
    // 加载管理员（必须，用于登录验证）
    var adminsResult = await supabase.from('admins').select('id,username,password,role,permissions');
    if (adminsResult.data && adminsResult.data.length > 0) {
    admins = adminsResult.data.map(function(a) {
    return {
    id: a.id,
    user: a.username,
    pass: a.password,
    role: a.role,
    perms: a.permissions || {}
    };
    });
    console.log("✓ 从数据库加载了 " + admins.length + " 名管理员");
    }
    // KPI项目、考核记录、评议记录延迟加载（在需要的时候加载）
    console.log("✓ 基础数据加载完成");
    } catch (error) {
    console.error('✗ 加载数据失败:', error);
    showToast('加载数据失败，请检查网络连接', 'error');
    } finally {
    hideLoadingOverlay();
    }
    }
    // 加载提示函数
    function showLoadingOverlay(text) {
    var overlay = document.getElementById('loadingOverlay');
    var textEl = document.querySelector('.loading-text');
    if (textEl) textEl.textContent = text || '正在加载数据...';
    overlay.style.display = 'flex';
    }
    function hideLoadingOverlay() {
    document.getElementById('loadingOverlay').style.display = 'none';
    }
    // 延迟加载KPI、考核记录、评议记录
    async function loadExtraDataFromSupabase() {
    try {
    console.log("开始加载扩展数据...");
    // 加载KPI项目
    var kpiResult = await supabase.from('kpi_items').select('*');
    if (kpiResult.data && kpiResult.data.length > 0) {
    kpiItems = kpiResult.data.map(function(k) {
    return {
    id: k.id,
    name: k.name,
    score: parseFloat(k.score),
    type: k.type,
    mode: k.mode,
    min: k.min_score,
    max: k.max_score
    };
    });
    console.log("✓ 从数据库加载了 " + kpiItems.length + " 个KPI项目");
    }
    // 如果KPI为空，加载默认数据
    if (kpiItems.length === 0) {
    kpiItems = [
    {name: "医院规章制度或工作纪律", score: -0.5, type: "扣分", mode: "fixed"},
    {name: "医疗纠纷事件", score: -1, type: "扣分", mode: "fixed"},
    {name: "服务投诉事件", score: -1, type: "扣分", mode: "fixed"},
    {name: "指令性任务", score: -0.5, type: "扣分", mode: "fixed"},
    {name: "医院质控要求或指标管理", score: -0.5, type: "扣分", mode: "fixed"},
    {name: "管理履职", score: -0.2, type: "扣分", mode: "fixed"},
    {name: "上级通报", score: -1, type: "扣分", mode: "fixed"},
    {name: "检查成绩", score: 2, type: "正负分", mode: "range", min: -5, max: 5},
    {name: "业务建设", score: 2, type: "正负分", mode: "range", min: -5, max: 5}
    ];
    console.log("✓ 加载了默认KPI项目");
    }
    // 加载考核记录
    var assessResult = await supabase.from('assess_records').select('*');
    if (assessResult.data && assessResult.data.length > 0) {
    assessRecords = assessResult.data.map(function(r) {
    return {
    id: r.id,
    userId: r.user_id,
    userName: r.user_name,
    group: r.group,
    item: r.item_name,
    itemName: r.item_name,
    score: parseFloat(r.score),
    reason: r.reason || '',
    date: new Date(r.created_at).toLocaleDateString(),
    year: r.assess_year,
    quarter: r.assess_quarter
    };
    });
    console.log("✓ 从数据库加载了 " + assessRecords.length + " 条考核记录");
    }
    // 加载评议记录
    var reviewResult = await supabase.from('review_records').select('*');
    if (reviewResult.data && reviewResult.data.length > 0) {
    reviewRecords = reviewResult.data.map(function(r) {
    return {
    id: r.id,
    userId: r.user_id,
    userName: r.user_name,
    group: r.group,
    score: r.score,
    opinion: r.opinion || '',
    date: new Date(r.created_at).toLocaleDateString(),
    year: r.review_year,
    quarter: r.review_quarter
    };
    });
    console.log("✓ 从数据库加载了 " + reviewRecords.length + " 条评议记录");
    }
    console.log("✓ 扩展数据加载完成");
    } catch (error) {
    console.error('✗ 加载扩展数据失败:', error);
    }
    }
    // 保存用户到 Supabase
    async function saveUserToSupabase(user) {
    if (!supabase) return;
    try {
    var dbUser = {
    name: user.name,
    gender: user.gender || '男',
    birth: user.birth || '',
    work_date: user.workDate || '',
    political: user.political || '群众',
    position: user.position,
    duty_date: user.dutyDate || '',
    group: user.group,
    staffing: user.staffing || '在编'
    };
    // 先查询是否已存在同名用户
    var existing = await supabase.from('users').select('id').eq('name', user.name).maybeSingle();
    if (existing.data && existing.data.id) {
    // 更新已有用户
    var result = await supabase.from('users').update(dbUser).eq('id', existing.data.id).select();
    if (result.data && result.data.length > 0) {
    return result.data[0].id;
    }
    } else {
    // 插入新用户
    var result = await supabase.from('users').insert([dbUser]).select();
    if (result.data && result.data.length > 0) {
    return result.data[0].id;
    }
    }
    } catch (error) {
    console.error('保存用户失败:', error);
    }
    return user.id;
    }
    // 删除用户
    async function deleteUserFromSupabase(id) {
    if (!supabase) return;
    try {
    await supabase.from('users').delete().eq('id', id);
    } catch (error) {
    console.error('删除用户失败:', error);
    }
    }
    // 获取干部密码
    async function getCadrePasswordFromSupabase(uid) {
    if (!supabase) {
    // 回退到 localStorage
    try {
    return localStorage.getItem('cadre_pass_' + uid);
    } catch (e) {
    return null;
    }
    }
    try {
    var result = await supabase.from('cadre_passwords').select('password').eq('user_id', uid).single();
    return result.data ? result.data.password : null;
    } catch (error) {
    return null;
    }
    }
    // 保存干部密码
    async function saveCadrePasswordToSupabase(uid, pass) {
    if (!supabase) {
    // 回退到 localStorage
    try {
    localStorage.setItem('cadre_pass_' + uid, pass);
    } catch (e) {}
    return;
    }
    try {
    await supabase.from('cadre_passwords').upsert({
    user_id: uid,
    password: pass
    });
    } catch (error) {
    console.error('保存密码失败:', error);
    }
    }
    // 保存KPI项目
    async function saveKpiToSupabase(item, idx) {
    if (!supabase) {
    saveKpiItemsLocal();
    return;
    }
    try {
    var dbItem = {
    name: item.name,
    score: item.score,
    type: item.type,
    mode: item.mode,
    min_score: item.min,
    max_score: item.max
    };
    if (item.id) {
    await supabase.from('kpi_items').update(dbItem).eq('id', item.id).select();
    } else {
    var result = await supabase.from('kpi_items').insert([dbItem]).select();
    if (result.data && result.data.length > 0) {
    kpiItems[idx].id = result.data[0].id;
    }
    }
    } catch (error) {
    console.error('保存KPI失败:', error);
    }
    }
    // 删除KPI项目
    async function deleteKpiFromSupabase(id) {
    if (!supabase || !id) return;
    try {
    await supabase.from('kpi_items').delete().eq('id', id);
    } catch (error) {
    console.error('删除KPI失败:', error);
    }
    }
    // 保存考核记录
    async function saveAssessRecordToSupabase(record) {
    if (!supabase) {
    saveAssessLocal();
    return;
    }
    try {
    var result = await supabase.from('assess_records').insert([{
    user_id: record.userId,
    user_name: record.userName,
    group: record.group,
    item_name: record.item,
    score: record.score,
    reason: record.reason || '',
    assess_year: record.year,
    assess_quarter: record.quarter
    }]).select();
    // 返回新记录的 ID
    if (result.data && result.data.length > 0) {
    return result.data[0].id;
    }
    } catch (error) {
    console.error('保存考核记录失败:', error);
    showToast('保存考核记录失败: ' + error.message, 'error');
    }
    return null;
    }
    // 删除考核记录
    async function deleteAssessRecordFromSupabase(id) {
    if (!supabase || !id) return;
    try {
    await supabase.from('assess_records').delete().eq('id', id);
    } catch (error) {
    console.error('删除考核记录失败:', error);
    }
    }
    // 保存评议记录
    async function saveReviewRecordToSupabase(record) {
    if (!supabase) {
    saveReviewsLocal();
    View remainder of file in raw view
